active_plan: Revise the R02 design against the accepted review findings
Extend Agent input and add strict capability/turn-result contracts
Define the repository-owned RTL Agent and Skill
Implement native OpenCode probing, isolation, event projection and process-tree timeout
Enforce whole-run manifests, RTL postconditions and bounded evidence
Add thin probe CLI, deterministic fake tests and explicit real smoke
Validate OpenCode 1.18.2 allowed and denied behavior
Harden timeout termination with bounded kill and close confirmation
Bind executable prefix argv into the experiment digest and synchronize acceptance evidence
Run the unified repository checks and preserve handoff state
next_3_steps: Implement R03 independently against CompileRequest and CompileResult
Compose the R02 and R03 public adapters only in R04
Select and review the dataset/provider, evaluation profile and formal model before R04 batch execution

validation.last_result: R02 guarded fixes passed native OpenCode 1.18.2 capability probe with unchanged production digests, 42 Core Loop tests with 2 real-smoke skips, 2 CLI tests, 145 repository tests with 2 skips, lint, typecheck, build, formatting and peer checks; final diff and Harness checks are recorded in the session log
known_failures: Linux execution was not run on this Windows host; R02 does not claim Linux readiness
OpenCode retains its own local session database outside shared Core Loop evidence

tried_approaches: Separated repository Agent/Skill definitions from the mutable run workspace
Bound each turn to resolved config, final Agent permissions, Agent, Skill and experiment digests
Projected OpenCode JSON events without retaining raw model or tool payloads
Used native fake execution for deterministic process and policy coverage
Adapted help probing to stderr and config discovery to trusted OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR
Added Windows absolute-path suffix permissions while retaining external-directory denial
Used separate real allowed-generation and actual denied-write smoke evidence
Bound graceful and forced termination plus close confirmation and mapped unconfirmed shutdown to AGENT_PROCESS_ERROR
Snapshotted mutable operator config and included ordered non-empty executable prefix arguments in the experiment digest

handoff.last_summary: R02 is implemented and Windows-validated; timeout shutdown is bounded and experiment identity now covers every non-empty executable prefix argument.
handoff.resume_from: Start R03 against @rtl-agent/core-loop. Keep R02 live-smoke inputs out of evaluation evidence and do not start R04 until R03 and an operator-selected dataset/profile are ready.
